short_description: Unified first-order calibration with linear, kernel, tree, kernelized latent-variable, and local regression models
long_description: Builds first-order calibration models for quantitative prediction with optional parameter optimization. Supports OLS, Ridge, Lasso, Elastic Net, Random Forest, SVR, Gradient Boosting, HistGradientBoosting, Gaussian Process Regression, PLS, PCR, Kernel PLS extension, and Local Regression (KNN, IDW, Adaptive Threshold, Radius, Kernel). Computes calibration/CV/validation statistics, provides model-specific diagnostics, supports local distance metrics, and exposes optimization curves for parameter tuning. Note: PLS/PCR/Kernel PLS apply latent-variable modeling of transformed predictors. For scale-sensitive models (Ridge, Lasso, Elastic Net, SVR, Gaussian Process, Kernel PLS), if routed flag 'was_scaled' is missing or false, autoscaling fallback is applied with a warning.

messages.first_order_calibration_default_loocv: No enabled CV configuration was found during optimization. Defaulted to LOOCV for parameter selection.

warnings.first_order_calibration_autoscale_fallba: The selected model requires scaled predictors for stable performance. Input flag 'was_scaled' was missing or false, so data was autoscaled as a fallback.

errors.first_order_calibration_ols_underdetermi: OLS cannot be fitted because the calibration design is underdetermined (number of variables is greater than or equal to number of calibration samples). Use PLS/PCR/Ridge or reduce variables.
errors.first_order_calibration_ols_fit_failed: OLS fitting failed due to an unstable or degenerate predictor matrix. Use PLS/PCR/Ridge or reduce variables.

layout.name: model_type
layout.label: Method
layout.tooltip: Calibration method: OLS, Ridge, Lasso, Elastic Net, Random Forest, SVR, Gradient Boosting, HistGradientBoosting, Gaussian Process, PLS, PCR, Kernel PLS, or Local Regression.

layout.name: local_method
layout.label: Local Regression Mode
layout.tooltip: knn = nearest-neighbor averaging, idw = inverse-distance weighted averaging, adaptive = similarity-threshold averaging, radius = radius-based averaging, kernel = Gaussian-kernel weighted averaging

layout.name: local_distance
layout.label: Local Distance Metric
layout.tooltip: Distance metric for local regression neighborhood/weighting calculations

layout.name: local_minkowski_p
layout.label: Minkowski p
layout.tooltip: Exponent p used by Minkowski distance (must be > 0)

layout.name: n_components
layout.label: Latent Variables / PCs
layout.tooltip: Fixed latent-variable count (PLS) or principal components (PCR) when optimization is OFF

layout.name: pls_scale
layout.label: PLS Scaling
layout.tooltip: If enabled, PLS applies variance scaling after internal mean-centering

layout.name: ridge_alpha
layout.label: Ridge Alpha
layout.tooltip: Fixed ridge regularization value when optimization is OFF

layout.name: lasso_alpha
layout.label: Lasso Alpha
layout.tooltip: Fixed lasso regularization value when optimization is OFF

layout.name: elastic_net_alpha
layout.label: Elastic Net Alpha
layout.tooltip: Elastic Net regularization strength when optimization is OFF

layout.name: elastic_net_l1_ratio
layout.label: Elastic Net L1 Ratio
layout.tooltip: Elastic Net L1 ratio in [0,1] controlling L1 vs L2 balance

layout.name: linear_max_iter
layout.label: Max Iterations
layout.tooltip: Maximum number of solver iterations. Increase if you see convergence warnings.

layout.name: random_forest_n_estimators
layout.label: Random Forest Trees
layout.tooltip: Number of trees in the Random Forest when optimization is OFF

layout.name: random_forest_max_depth
layout.label: Random Forest Max Depth
layout.tooltip: Maximum tree depth (0 means no limit)

layout.name: random_forest_min_samples_leaf
layout.label: Random Forest Min Samples Leaf
layout.tooltip: Minimum number of samples required in each terminal leaf

layout.name: random_forest_max_features
layout.label: Random Forest Max Features
layout.tooltip: Feature subset size per split (use numeric fraction, integer count, sqrt, log2, or none)

layout.name: random_forest_bootstrap
layout.label: Random Forest Bootstrap
layout.tooltip: Enable bootstrap sampling for Random Forest

layout.name: random_forest_oob_score
layout.label: Random Forest OOB Score
layout.tooltip: Compute out-of-bag score (requires bootstrap enabled)

layout.name: svr_kernel
layout.label: SVR Kernel
layout.tooltip: Kernel for support vector regression

layout.name: svr_epsilon

layout.name: svr_gamma
layout.label: SVR Gamma
layout.tooltip: SVR kernel gamma (>0, <=0 uses internal scaling)

layout.tooltip: Polynomial degree for SVR when using poly kernel

layout.name: svr_coef0
layout.label: SVR Coef0
layout.tooltip: Independent term for poly/sigmoid SVR kernels

layout.label: GB Learning Rate

layout.name: gradient_boosting_subsample
layout.label: GB Subsample
layout.tooltip: Fraction of samples used to fit each boosting stage (0,1]

layout.name: gradient_boosting_max_features
layout.label: GB Max Features
layout.tooltip: Feature subset size per split (numeric fraction, integer count, sqrt, log2, or none)

layout.name: gradient_boosting_max_depth
layout.label: GB Max Depth
layout.tooltip: Tree depth for Gradient Boosting base learners

layout.name: gradient_boosting_min_samples_leaf
layout.label: GB Min Samples Leaf

sections.short_description: Ellipsoidal joint confidence region (EJCR) for OLS slope and intercept of calibration predictions. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased calibration.
Ellipsoidal joint confidence region (EJCR) for OLS slope and intercept of validation predictions. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased prediction.
